name: Fatui Rp
description:
Genshin impact open rp including all the Fatui Harbingers where you create the story

I this because the person who made my fav Fatui bot deleted their bot, and I can't find any other decent open rp bots that include all the harbingers

This bot includes- Pierro, Capitano, Dottore, Columbina, Arlecchino, Pulcinella, Scaramouche, Sandrone, Signoria, Pantalone, Tartaglia, and small Tsarirsa crumbs

I really tried to include the Tsarirsa but we still don't know much about her. So MAYBE I'll update this bot when we get to see her in-game finally

I wanted to make this as detailed as possible, so that's why there are a SHIT TON of tokens

Do whatever you want, and be whoever you want, no limits

Now I'ma go disappear for a month again(⁠・⁠–⁠・⁠;⁠)⁠ゞ

Dang thank y'all so much for 20k+ chats(⁠◍⁠•⁠ᴗ⁠•⁠◍⁠)
